hero.title: Every Ugandan child reading at grade level.
hero.subtitle: Ozeki Reading Bridge Foundation works with public primary schools to help children become confident readers — and gives donors, governments, and journalists live proof of the difference.

auth.magicLinkExplain: We don't use passwords. Click the link we email you, and you're in.

press.title: Everything you need to write the story
press.subtitle: Hover any number to see its source, methodology, and sample size.

evidence.captureGps: Tap a button to add photos
evidence.gpsDenied: GPS denied — relying on photo EXIF only
evidence.noPhotosYet: No photos added yet. Take a photo at the school to attach GPS-tagged evidence.
